c.d: Maximum number of contacts to which messages can be broadcast simultaneously, indicating scalability for large campaigns
Ability to integrate with other business tools or platforms like CRM, email, or productivity suites for enhanced workflow
Support for sending messages individually to contacts with options for custom text or AI-generated content
Ease of use measured by interface design, message composition, and contact management capabilities
Capability to send photos, videos, and other media along with messages
Tools for creating, managing, and segmenting groups or lists for targeted message broadcasts
Availability of real-time metrics and analytics to monitor campaign performance and optimize messaging
Level of encryption and privacy features offered to protect message content and user data
